name: rabbit-feature
summary: Dispatcher-side feature-touch orchestration surface. Owns the rabbit-feature-touch skill and three general-purpose helper skills (rabbit-feature-scope, rabbit-feature-scaffold, rabbit-feature-audit) plus their backing scripts (resolve-scope.py, format-feature-context.py, scaffold-feature.py, audit-owner.py). Spec lifecycle skills (rabbit-spec-create, rabbit-spec-update) are owned by rabbit-spec. Executor-side TDD machinery (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py, tdd-step.py) lives in tdd-subagent and is consumed via the cross-feature contract.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: issue #399 Phase 2b file-location refactor: spec/contract/CHANGELOG relocate specs/ -> flat docs/; normative invariant content unchanged, version-bump + self-reference updates applied in IMPLEMENT
